positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast graphic illustration featuring celestial flora and mystical geometric patterns. The central element is a stylized glowing moon cradling delicate, bioluminescent fractal leaves and abstract cosmic dust. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, electric teal, muted gold, and pure white, emphasizing strong silhouettes against a deep void background. The composition must be centered and highly decorative, suitable for a repeating, large-scale apparel print. Highly detailed line work, Art Nouveau meets modern psychedelic geometry, vector art aesthetic, vibrant glow effect, clean edges, mystical, symmetry.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, trademark, signature, graffiti, bad anatomy, artifacts, oversaturated, poorly drawn, cropped, extra limbs
